title: Effect of indivisible obligation among successors
doc_html:
Art. 1819.  Effect of indivisible obligation among successors

An indivisible obligation may not be divided among the successors of the obligor or of the obligee, who are thus subject to the rules governing solidary obligors or solidary obligees.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
